name: Huo Energy Medicine & Acupuncture NYC
description: AI agent for Huo Energy Medicine & Acupuncture NYC. Provides clinic information, treatment details, pricing, appointment scheduling guidance, and research publications for Dr. Frank Huo's acupuncture and energy medicine practice in Fresh Meadows, Queens, New York.

skills.name: Get Clinic Information
skills.description: Returns contact details, address, hours, and pricing for the clinic

skills.name: List Treatments & Conditions
skills.description: Lists all treatment modalities and conditions treated including acupuncture, energy medicine, and herbal medicine

skills.name: Research & Credentials
skills.description: Provides information about Dr. Huo's published research at Columbia Presbyterian Medical Center with Dr. Oz and media appearances
examples: What research has Dr. Huo published?
Tell me about the Columbia study

skills.name: Patient Chat
skills.description: AI-powered conversational assistant that answers patient questions about the clinic, treatments, and scheduling
examples: How do I book an appointment?

skills.name: Site Search
skills.description: Search across all clinic pages for specific treatments, conditions, or information
